\tzpentry{ID4464}{Entry Spectral Gap Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4464 introduces Entry Spectral Gap Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\Delta_T = \mathbf{D} - \mathbf{A} \equiv \sum_{j \in \text{Nodes}} \mathcal{A}_{ij} (\delta_i - \delta_j) \cdot \chi_T, \quad \text{subject to } \text{spec}(\Delta_T) \subset [0, \lambda_{\max}]$$
